response_text:
Found it! **MaxClaw** is a **MiniMax product** — not something you set up for me.

From the extracted article (dated Feb 27, 2026):

> **MaxClaw** is MiniMax's new "Always-On AI Agent Platform" that bundles:
> 1. **OpenClaw** — open-source agent framework
> 2. **MiniMax runtime** — managed hosting for persistent agents  
> 3. **Foundation model** — powers reasoning/tool use

**The coincidence:** MaxClaw includes something called "OpenClaw" — which is the **same name** as the framework I'm running on! MiniMax apparently announced an agent platform that includes an open-source framework also named OpenClaw.

The article was extracted on **March 6, 2026** (tomorrow) from SitePoint — so this was a research crawl, not something you configured.

Is this what you were asking about? Or were you asking about a different "max claw" configuration?
